generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor embedded in the BIM model, providing real‑time illumination level measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor embedded in the BIM model, detecting presence of occupants for space usage analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor (temperature, humidity, CO₂) embedded in the BIM model, streaming indoor climate data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance LightingSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance OccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

// C5: Data (live streams)
instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live illumination level data stream from LightingSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live occupancy detection data stream from OccupancySensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live temperature, humidity, and CO₂ data stream from EnvironmentalSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

// C2: Acting components (actuators & controllers)
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator modelled in BIM to control lighting levels based on sensor input and optimization logic."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator modelled in BIM to regulate heating, ventilation and air‑conditioning services."
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller coordinating actuators and applying control logic defined in runtime semantics."
]

// C10: Models / Data models
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model containing geometry, topology and device metadata for the building."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime semantics model defining sensor configurations, control logic and event handling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool, EclipseDitto
]

instance LiveDataStreamsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model aggregating live data streams for monitoring, analytics and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and platforms)
instance BIMSemanticBackbone : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM used as the semantic backbone linking physical components to virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Driven Engineering toolchain for model‑to‑model and model‑to‑text transformations generating deployment artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceDeploymentAutomation
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono IoT broker handling MQTT/HTTP ingestion of real‑time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital‑twin platform hosting device twins and providing twin state management."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard,
                        Interactive3DVisualization,
                        PredictiveAnalyticsService,
                        EnergyOptimizationService,
                        ModelManagementService,
                        CustomServicePlugInPlatform
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 providing high‑fidelity interactive 3‑D visualization of the building twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionPoint : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point allowing integration of custom services and plug‑ins."
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServicePlugInPlatform
]

// C6: Services
instance SensorDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ingesting real‑time sensor measurements from Eclipse Hono into the twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard delivering real‑time monitoring of building performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3‑D visualization service powered by Unreal Engine 5 for stakeholder exploration."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service generating forecasts and anomaly detection on sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight,
                        OptimizationRecommendationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service suggesting and executing actions to reduce consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight,
                        AdjustHVACAction
]

instance ModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing BIM and runtime semantics models within the twin platform."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelIntegrityInsight
]

instance ServiceDeploymentAutomation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automation service generating and deploying configuration artifacts for Hono, Ditto and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentSuccessInsight
]

instance CustomServicePlugInPlatform : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Platform enabling custom service plug‑ins via the standardized extension point."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomUserAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time operational insight on building system status and performance."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from interactive 3‑D visualization, highlighting spatial relationships."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight forecasting future building conditions and potential failures."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation insight proposing optimal control set‑points for energy efficiency."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting on energy consumption trends and potential savings."
]

instance ModelIntegrityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming consistency and validity of BIM and runtime models."
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful ingestion and integrity of incoming sensor data."
]

instance DeploymentSuccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful generation and deployment of twin configuration artifacts."
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and daylight availability."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic modification of HVAC set‑points to achieve energy‑optimal climate conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomUserAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User‑defined custom action executed via a plug‑in service."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Environment (central DT framework)
instance DigitalTwinFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingSensor, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor,
                 LightingActuator, HVACActuator, BCSController,
                 EnrichedBIMModel, RuntimeSemanticsModel, LiveDataStreamsModel,
                 EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5,
                 RealTimeMonitoringDashboard, Interactive3DVisualization,
                 PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control messages generated by the Digital Twin are sent back to physical actuators through the same Hono/Ditto middleware, enabling the twin to issue commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC set‑points) to the building control system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time synchronization (sub‑second update rates) between physical sensor streams and the Digital Twin, driven by the Hono/Ditto real‑time data exchange layer."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT framework hub orchestrating bidirectional data flow between enriched BIM models, Hono/Ditto middleware, and visualization services; modular components connect through defined interfaces to form the overall twin ecosystem."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans the building life‑cycle stages of design (ideal BIM model), construction/manufacturing (as‑built BIM enrichment), and operation (runtime‑aware twin incorporating live sensor data and control logic)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is employed to assess how faithfully the twin mirrors its physical counterpart, providing a quantitative measure of entanglement and model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication relies on Eclipse Hono (supporting MQTT and HTTP) and Eclipse Ditto (exposing REST/HTTP and WebSocket APIs), establishing the network link between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The twin components (Hono broker, Ditto platform, Unreal Engine client) are hosted on server infrastructure that runs the middleware services and provides the visualization front‑end; deployment is automated via the model‑driven framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach leverages BIM standards for building information, and adopts industry‑wide IoT communication standards (MQTT, REST/HTTP) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto; extension points follow service‑oriented architectural standards."
]
